calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-09-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, VJ. Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioner: Lynda De Petris, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Johncarlo Anthony De Petris, was sworn and examined.
Co-Petitioner/Minor's Father: Walther De Petris, not present, but consented to the name changed in the filed Petition.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Giancarlo Anthony De Petris.
Decree signed in open court.
